programme.title: Travelers Championship 2015 Hlts
programme.desc: The 2015 Travelers Championship at TPC River Highlands in Cromwell, Connecticut. Last year, Kevin Streelman clinched the title with a one-shot victory over KJ Choi and Sergio Garcia.

programme.title: Playing Lessons: Max Homa Part 1
programme.desc: Multiple-time PGA TOUR winner Max Homa joins Bones on the course, and shares the tips and strategies that have led to his global success. Part 1.

programme.title: Playing Lessons: Max Homa Part 2
programme.desc: Multiple-time PGA TOUR winner Max Homa joins Bones on the course, and shares the tips and strategies that have led to his global success. Part 2.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, learn the science behind getting distance on your drive. Ep 3.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, obtain the knowledge to escape safely from the bunker. Ep 4.

programme.title: Golf Academy: Monty Bunker Play
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game across all aspects, from the tee to the green. Here, Colin Montgomerie offers some tips on bunker play.

programme.title: Golf Academy: Sorenstam Bunker
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game from the tee to the green. Here, golf star Annika Sörenstam gives advice on improving your bunker play.

programme.title: Ladies European Tour Golf Hlts
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the Women's Australian Open on the Ladies European Tour, held at Kooyonga Golf Club in Adelaide.

programme.title: Ladies European Tour Golf Hlts
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the 2026 Australian WPGA Championship, an LET event taking place at Sanctuary Cove Golf and Country Club in Queensland.

programme.title: Ladies European Tour Golf Hlts
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the 2026 Aramco Championship, a Ladies European Tour event staged at Shadow Creek Golf Course in Nevada. Spain's Nuria Iturrioz scooped last year's prize.

programme.title: Ladies European Tour Golf Hlts
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the Joburg Ladies Open, a Ladies European Event held at Randpark Golf Club. England's Mimi Rhodes clinched victory this time a year ago.

programme.title: Chevron Championship Day 4 Hlts
programme.desc: The concluding day of the Chevron Championship at Memorial Park. Taking a five-shot lead into the final round, Nelly Korda attempts to keep former champion Patty Tavatanakit at bay. (26.

programme.title: US Women's Open Golf R4 Hlts
programme.desc: The final day of the US Women's Open at the Riviera Country Club. Taking a share of the lead yesterday, Nelly Korda is primed to clinch a second straight Major title. (07.

programme.title: Women's PGA Championship 2025
programme.desc: The fourth and final day of the 2025 KPMG Women's PGA Championship, taking place at Fields Ranch in Texas. Australia's Minjee Lee soared into the lead heading into the final day.

programme.title: Rose Ladies Series Golf
programme.desc: Comprising five one-day warm-up tournaments across England for stars of the LET, the 2026 edition of the Rose Ladies Series continued at Buckinghamshire Golf Club.

programme.title: Rose Ladies Series Golf
programme.desc: Comprising five one-day warm-up tournaments across England for stars of the LET, the 2026 edition of the Rose Ladies Series concluded at North Hants Golf Club.

programme.title: PGA Tour Champions Highlights
programme.desc: Tournament highlights from the Principal Charity Classic - a PGA Tour Champions event held at the Wakonda Club. Spain's Miguel Angel Jiménez conquered the rest a year ago.

programme.title: PGA Tour: The Cut
programme.desc: A look behind the scenes of the PGA Tour. Follow the world's best players as they prepare for the big events in 2026.

programme.title: HotelPlanner Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the England Golf Challenge during the 2026 season of the HotelPlanner Tour, the second tier of men's professional golf in Europe.

programme.title: US Open Golf Final Round Hlts
programme.desc: The final round of the 126th US Open Championship at Shinnecock Hills Golf Club. JJ Spaun snatched Major glory last year with a two-shot win over Scotland's Robert MacIntyre. (21.

programme.title: Chronicles of a Champion Golfer Tony Jacklin
programme.desc: Remember the career of England's Tony Jacklin, who won both The 1969 Open Championship and 1970 US Open, as well being a successful Ryder Cup captain in the 1980s.

programme.title: Travelers Championship 2017 Hlts
programme.desc: The 2017 Travelers Championship at TPC River Highlands. One of the most well-attended events on the PGA Tour, Scotland's Russell Knox is the defending champion.

programme.title: Playing Lessons: Kamaiu Johnson

programme.title: CINTA DARI SURGA EPS 29
programme.desc: It tells the story of Cinta (Melayu Nicole Hall), who is caught in a complicated love triangle with Revan and Bayu, filled with action and comedy. Cinta is forced to marry Viko to save her adoptive mother, leading to a deeply difficult and emotional dilemma.

programme.title: ADA DUA CINTA EPS 35
programme.desc: It tells the story of two girls, Mecca (who comes from humble circumstances) and Medina (who is wealthy), who are connected through Ayu—Mecca's biological mother—who adopted Medina. Conflict arises when they both fall in love with the same man, creating an emotional romantic drama that tugs at the heartstrings.

programme.title: CINTA SEPENUH JIWA EPS 106
programme.desc: Lala is a young girl, the second daughter of Andi and Desi, who since childhood has carried enthusiasm and a smile with her every step. Her life is simple but full of color thanks to one thing she truly loves: cooking. For Lala, the kitchen is not just a place to prepare ingredients. It is a space for expression, a place where she pours out her emotions, wraps stories into every seasoning, and ser

programme.title: CAHAYA TERINDAH EPS 18
programme.desc: A drama series that tells the story of Indah (Ranty Maria) and her struggle to find her biological family after discovering that she was adopted. She runs away to Jakarta from her adoptive father (Jamal), who intends to sell her, and ends up working for the Hendardi family, where she faces romantic conflicts and emotional mysteries from her past.

programme.title: KESETIAAN JANJI CINTA EPS 95
programme.desc: Meira no longer feels happy in her marriage. Lately, Arya, her husband, constantly looks for faults in her. As a result, Meira and Arya often get into arguments. The situation reaches its peak when Arya refuses to provide for Meira anymore. He even refuses to help cover the medical expenses of Meira's mother, Siti. Arya also stops paying for Lani's college tuition, Meira's younger sister. Even tho

programme.title: KARENA AKU SAYANG 40
programme.desc: Kenzie is a man who has experienced countless traumatic events in his past. These experiences have shaped him into a perfectionist who often makes things difficult for those around him. One of them is Zara, his personal assistant, who constantly tries to cheer him up as he frequently experiences mood swings in various situations.

programme.title: CINTA BERAKHIR BAHAGIA 69
programme.desc: Adisty, a beautiful young woman who serves as the backbone of her family, nearly becomes a sex worker to pay off her family's debts. However, fate brings her together with Pasha, a respectable man from a wealthy family. Unbeknownst to them, they were actually switched at birth. What will happen to Adisty and Pasha's lives?

programme.desc: Nusantara is a place full of mystical spirits and the supernatural. Each episode has a unique solution depending on the type of disturbance, the type of genie and the effect on the main character.

programme.desc: Pregnant and recently widowed Cahya gets a job as a maid working in an isolated old mansion. Unable to take the loneliness anymore, she opens a doorway to the spirit world to reconnect with her late husband. In doing so, she inadvertently awakens the tormented ghosts of the mansion's previous owner and the maids.

programme.title: The Story of the Death
programme.desc: Border patrol Police Lieutenant Aod, sends his subordinates to bust a drug trafficking operation. Due to serving on the force for many years, he was away from his parents for a long time. Therefore, he requested to be transferred back to Bangkok to care for his parents. Many years later, his parents die from disease. Aod continues to live alone at home and does not associate with anyone.

programme.title: Syirik

Unfortunately for him, the SLR camera is haunted and the Devil challenges him to push the boundaries of photography. With the support of his friend and girlfriend, Dan can either accept the challenge, or fight back.

During her tragic lifetime, the woman in question had been severely disfigured by her psychotic husband, who slashed her from mouth-to-cheek with a pair of scissors. After her untimely death, she prowled the streets of the town, clad in a surgical mask and a long, sweeping coat, and would accost her

programme.title: The Slit Mouthed Woman 2
programme.desc: 1978, Gifu prefecture, Japan. Three sisters grow up on a chicken farm in a small town. The oldest sister, Yukie, is engaged to be married, the middle sister, Sachiko works at a beauty salon and the youngest, Mayu, is on the track team in high school. Their happy carefree lives are changed forever when Yukie's ex-boyfriend Suzuki commits an atrocious crime with Mayu as the tragic victim. Half-craze

programme.title: Susuk
programme.desc: Imran is a good son to his mother. He takes care of his mother even though his mother has been behaving strangely ever since she fell sick. This had Imran thinking that his mother is possibly practicing a black magic called Susuk. Imran asks for advice from a religious man in the mosque to help him remove the Susuk.

programme.title: Pemain Kaset
programme.desc: A production team is visiting an old abandoned village house to determine if it is suitable for them to shoot a film there. While cleaning the house to prepare for the shooting, they discover a room within which a radio is playing Quranic verses on loop. Mindlessly, they turn the radio off. Strange happenings start to occur.

programme.title: You Die
programme.desc: After lending a complete stranger her phone, Asia becomes stuck with a new augmented reality app that is actually connected to the world of the dead, letting her see them through the phone's camera. The downside to it is that it will result in its user's death after twenty-four hours.

On a night full of terror, Rini and her family must save themselves.

programme.title: HIKMAH
programme.desc: A reality show that encapsulates everyday life stories, personal trials, and spiritual journeys. programme.title: Ngga Usah Ngadi Ngadi Nanti Kamu Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Derry broke up with Vina after they had a fight and misunderstanding. Derry, who was now closer to Elsa, helped Elsa sell roasted corn. Derry's father, who found out about this, was angry with Derry and forbade him from approaching Elsa again. He preferred if Derry was with Vina. According to Derry's father, the hotel's image would be damaged if Derry remained with Elsa and helped Elsa sell roaste

programme.title: Ada Kalanya Cinta Melipir Dari Hati Duluan
programme.desc: Wulan (Jennifer Eve) helps a pickpocket escape from a mob, and strangely enough, Wulan even tricks the pickpocket several times by returning the stolen wallets to their owners. With determination, Ninin persists, despite facing criticism from s

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Jasa Boleh Disewa, Kalo Hati Jangan
programme.desc: Cahaya's (Larasati Nugroho) life goal is to make her sister happy. One day, Laras meets Adit (Rizki Alatas). They're both in a hurry, and their paper bags get swapped. Rizki's paper bag is for his fiancée, a beautiful ring. Laras's paper bag contains a simple bracelet.

programme.title: Dari Sini Kita Belajar Untuk Jatuh Cinta
programme.desc: Julian (Arya Vasco) is determined to find the whereabouts of Vino's mother and sibling, his close friend. It turns out that Julian is reunited with Gea (Saskia Chadwick), the person whose bag he once stole, who turns out to be Vino's younger sibling, separated for more than a decade. In order to deliver Vino's last message, Julian disguises himself as Vino and enters the life of Gea and her family

Kenny doesn't accept this, and they get into an argument.

programme.desc: The drama 'Cut Amirah' starts with the background of the 2004 tsunami in Acheh, progressing to the year 2011. It revolves around the love story and agony of an orphan, Cut Amirah, an Acheh origin, who lost her whole family due to the tsunami which occurred on the very frightful evening at 4pm, 24 December 2004. The tsunami came carrying a horrifying 9 Richter magnitude scale.

programme.title: Tekan Minyak - EP 9

Despite her efforts, she faces one challenge after another, forcing her to become even stronger in order to endure. Surrounded by people who are cruel and hostile towards her, Mutiara’s journey seems relentless. Fortunately, she has a loyal friend in Dianda, who continuously supports and encourages her to persevere.

This episode captures how they uphold the weight of life with skill and resilience, even amid limited resources and const

programme.title: The Fading Gold - EP 24 / 金式森林
programme.desc: Chaoqun asks Huanqiu to arrange a meeting with Lin Cheng, intending to reveal a truth to resolve their conflict, but it ultimately leads to an unexpected incident

programme.title: (Live) News Tonight / 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Focus - EP 13 / 焦点
programme.desc: Focus provides timely reports and analyses on international news and current affairs from Singapore's perspective.

programme.title: Swords into Plowshares - EP 42 / 太平年
programme.desc: The narrative follows three young heroes — Zhao Kuangyin, Qian Hongchu, and Guo Rong — who navigate the chaos of war to unite rival states. Their journey of friendship, sacrifice, and the quest for peace offers a rich, emotionally engaging experience for viewers.

programme.title: The Legend of Heroes - Hot Blooded - EP 7 / 金庸武侠世界之铁血丹心
programme.desc: The foolish young lad, Guo Jing, ultimately matures into a national hero who stands for the country and the people, embodying the true essence of chivalry.

programme.title: Camping Around The World - EP 2 / 在世界的角落扎营
programme.desc: Model couple Darren and Evelyn went on a camping trip to Taiwan's Lanyu island. Not only did they explore underground houses, savour indigenous cuisine, paddle canoes, they also dived into the stunning underwater world, fully embracing nature's gifts.

programme.title: Code Of Honour - EP 3 / 正义武馆
programme.desc: This is a freshly repackaged classic drama, with Chinese Martial Arts as its main selling point. Infused with the touch of pugilistic novels, an emphasis on feelings of righteousness, and glimpses of how legends are created.

programme.title: Code Of Honour - EP 4 / 正义武馆
programme.desc: This is a freshly repackaged classic drama, with Chinese Martial Arts as its main selling point. Infused with the touch of pugilistic novels, an emphasis on feelings of righteousness, and glimpses of how legends are created.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 563 / 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. Through the love story of the previous generation, it connects the common emotions between the two generations depicting the memories and in-depth exploration of the differences in values between them.

programme.title: Golden City - EP 564 / 多情城市
programme.desc: This drama is set in the Jiufen area from the 1960s to the 1970s. It tells the story of how three brothers conquered the world with their bare hands. programme.title: Rookies' Kitchen - EP 2 / 上蔡乐
programme.desc: Hue, the champion of "King Of Culinary", is invited to teach the hosts to cook Vietnamese food. Is she a strict teacher? Will the duo perform up to expectations? The dishes they are going to learn and prepare are Canh Chua and Ca Kho To. Will their version taste the same as their teacher?

programme.title: The Tigress of Shaolin
programme.desc: Hui Ying-hung co-stars with Liu Chia-yung in this fast-paced comedy that features the outrageous Leprosy Boxing style.

programme.title: Sweet and Wild
programme.desc: With a twisted plot, mistaken identities, along with some terrific musical numbers, this comedy of errors featuring Li Ching is absolutely fabulous.

programme.title: The Jade Faced Assassin
programme.desc: Essie Lin Chia plays an evil lady warrior who raises the son of a swordsman who scorned her with a blood-curdling ulterior motive in mind.

programme.title: The Magnificent Concubine
programme.desc: An emperor's obsession with his consort distracts him, allowing his cruel prime minister who also happens to be his consort's brother, to run the nation.

programme.title: The Eunuch
programme.desc: To achieve his goal, a man who craves supreme power stops at nothing, including murdering the Emperor and using his own daughter as a pawn.

programme.title: Tiger Killer
programme.desc: Adapted from the novel Water Margin and starring Ti Lung, this award-winning drama depicts how the courageous Wu Song defeats a tiger, and his bond with Wu Da Lang.

programme.title: Na Cha and the Seven Devils
programme.desc: Little Na Cha accidentally drops 7 magical peaches onto earth, which transformed 7 animals into devils. Na Cha must hunt them all down or his father will be punished by the King of Heaven.

programme.title: Rear Entrance
programme.desc: This moving tale centers on a childless woman who cares for an emotionally battered girl.

programme.title: Oath of Death
programme.desc: When Sung Dynasty patriot Chin Liang runs afoul of a corrupt acquaintance, he is forced to avenge the villain's treachery via a self-sacrificing oath.

programme.title: Sunset
programme.desc: What starts off as a musical romp turns into something more akin to a Shakespearean tragedy than a beach-babe party. Starring Ching Li.

programme.title: The Singing Thief
programme.desc: A jewel thief tries to have a new life as a singer but a series of robberies gets people wondering if he has returned to his old ways.

programme.title: The Younger Generation
programme.desc: After a young mother and her husband die, one child is sold into prostitution to feed the other four.

programme.title: Dragon Swamp
programme.desc: Cheng Pei-pei, swordswoman extraordinaire, teams with Lo Lieh in this fast-paced 'Martial Arts World' adventure, a quest for the legendary 'Jade Dragon Sword.'

programme.title: 7-Man Army
programme.desc: See how seven men stationed at Pa Tou Lou Tzu, a key point of the Great Wall, took on an entire Japanese army for five days before they succumbed.

programme.title: The Millionaire Chase
programme.desc: A nightclub owner (Peter Chen Ho) has his way with three sisters while gallivanting across Asia. Also starring Lily Ho, Chin Ping.

programme.title: The Lady Assassin
programme.desc: See how Prince 4 tries his hardest to kill the heir apparent, Prince 14 and how, out of frustration, he finally engages an assassin to do the job.

programme.title: The Delinquent
programme.desc: A hothead (Wang Chung) is tempted by the dark side in this coming-of-age tale which centres on c. 1970s lower-class Hong Kong teens.

programme.title: To Kill a Mastermind
programme.desc: Founded by rogue martial artists, the Qisha gang's specialty is crime. When spies infiltrate the group, they become caught in a power struggle between the gang leader and his righthand man.

programme.title: The Comedy of Mismatches
programme.desc: Pat Ting Hung, Carrie Ku Mei and Li Hsiang Chun star in this delightful tale of mistaken identities caused by monogrammed handkerchiefs.

programme.title: The Dragon Missile
programme.desc: A dying crime lord sends a gang of assassins to steal a special herb that may cure him. However, they become the targets of a couple on a vendetta.

programme.title: Big Times for the Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: When a bag of jewels falls from the sky, that's just the start of Ah Niu's misadventures involving a brothel, a disastrous wedding night and the cops!

programme.title: Five Tough Guys
programme.desc: Five Tough Guys

programme.title: Challenge of the Gamesters
programme.desc: A master gambler and his partner are recruited to investigate a Shanghai tycoon suspected of using his casino as a front for espionage. Now, they must win this deadly game of skill and deception.

programme.title: Masked Avengers
programme.desc: When masked killers begin wreaking havoc, three fearless fighters investigate the truth in this magnificent martial arts saga.

programme.title: Let's Fall in Love
programme.desc: Pressured by his parents to marry prior to taking over his father's business, Guan rejects every girl they find but then, he stumbles upon the perfect one?

programme.title: Mad Monkey Kung Fu
programme.desc: After a kung-fu master (Lau Kar Leung) is crippled by a ruthless villain, he teaches a boy monkey kung-fu to avenge his shame.

programme.title: Return of the Dead
programme.desc: Li Han Hsiang's dark offering depicts the destructive effects of lust as narrated by three psychiatric patients in an asylum.

programme.title: Guess Who Killed My Twelve Lovers?
programme.desc: A beauty is accused of slaying her boyfriends. After fleeing to Lantau Island, she seduces another man there.

programme.title: Live: FIFA World Cup Today
programme.desc: Hosts Rob Stone and Rebecca Lowe, with analysts like Zlatan Ibrahimovic, Thierry Henry, and Alexi Lalas, offer match insights and analysis.

programme.title: Live: WCTI News Channel 12 on FOX Eastern Carolina
programme.desc: Stay informed with the latest breaking news and headlines.

programme.title: The National News Desk
programme.desc: Local and national perspectives on the latest news.

programme.title: FIFA World Cup On FOX After Hours With James Corden
programme.desc: James Corden is joined by former England national team captain Rio Ferdinand and comedian Ian Karmel to spotlight the tournament's most talked-about moments and storylines of the day; guest appearances from the biggest names in culture and soccer.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: An Internet-savvy investigator works to solve a decades-old murder case.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit

programme.title: Suamiku Bukan Tukang Masak
programme.desc: Sejak Nur mengandung, hidup Adi jadi 'huru-hara' melayani kerenah isterinya. Alahan teruk menyebabkan Nur langsung tidak boleh memasak dan hanya mahu makan masakan Adi. Kerana itu, Adi mula belajar memasak dengan seseorang.

programme.title: Citra Exclusive: Penjara Abah
programme.desc: Natasha merupakan seorang kanak-kanak pintar namun dinafikan hak belajar oleh ayahnya. Dengan bantuan Cikgu Atok, Natasha berjaya bersekolah namun ada harga yang harus dibayar.

programme.title: No information available
programme.desc: No information available

programme.title: Cicakman 2 : Planet Hitam
programme.desc: Professor Klon kembali menyerang Cicakman dan mengancam keamanan Metrofulus bersama Rrama. Dibintangi oleh Saiful Apek, Yusry Abdul Halim, Fasha Sandha, Tamara Bleszynski, Adlin Aman Ramli dan AC Mizal.

programme.title: Sembilu 2
programme.desc: Percintaan Awie dan Wati terus diuji dengan kisah silam yang kian menghantui mereka. Lakonan Erra Fazira, Awie dan Ziana Zain.

programme.title: Cupcake Mama
programme.desc: Mengisahkan Hanna, isteri dan ibu yang bosan dengan rutin hidup. Dorongan keluarga membawa dia memulakan perniagaan cupcake dari rumah, sambil mengimbangi peranan sebagai isteri, ibu dan usahawan.

programme.title: Walid Ep11
programme.desc: Malam Keberkatan tiba. Walid terleka dengan janji ketaatan baharu, sementara Ummi Hafizah membayar harga mahal atas penentangannya. Raras sedar sesetengah rahsia harus kekal tertanam.

programme.title: Cicakman
programme.desc: Hairi, seorang pemuda yang mendapat kuasa luar biasa selepas dia tertelan seekor cicak ketika membuat ujikaji di makmal. Lakonan Saiful Apek, Fasha Sandha dan Yusry KRU.

programme.title: Good Boys Go To Heaven Ep05
programme.desc: Yasser is reaching his breaking point, willing to hurt others for the truth. Dahlia tries to uncover what lies behind her husband's condition.

programme.title: Ali Setan 2

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don't consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: Whether you call them Pouldeau, American Coot, or Water Chickens, chances are you don't consider them a delicacy. However, Jean-Paul is out to prove that these abundant birds have a place at the dinner table. Tune in as thew crew makes some incredible gumbo while preparing for their last hunt at Duck Camp.

programme.title: Duck Camp Dinners
programme.desc: It's the final day at Duck Camp for Jean-Paul and the guys. They finish up their trip with a morning of hunting followed by an afternoon filled with crawfish and catfish. The trip ends on dry land and the crew reflects on what makes the duck camp so special.

programme.title: Hard Truths of Conservation EP-11
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela's” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it's only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife

A series of freeway car accidents leads to a catastrophic overpass collapse that endangers the lives of civilians and members of the 118.
Athena and Bobby set off on their honeymoon cruise, but when duty calls, their vacation is put on hold; a fighter jet traps a civilian; an unusual incident leaves a couple stuck together.

The disastrous cruise continues when Bobby and Athena respond to the ship's explosion, racing to aid injured passengers; Hen questions her instincts in a life-taking call and grows concerned about Athena and Bobby's whereabouts.

With each moment becoming critical as the ship flips upside down, Athena and Bobby take charge, seeking methods for rescue while navigating efforts to guide survivors to safety; Hen defies protocols in her search for Bobby and Athena.

Upon her return to shore, Athena's son finds himself in trouble with the law; Buck grows envious as Eddie forms a close bond with someone else; the team rescues a woman who's stuck on receiving a rose at an iconic mansion.

Hen and Karen welcome a new addition to their family; a call unfolds involving a person's limb that's taken on a mind of its own; Eddie and Marisol take a closer look at their relationship; Buck navigates his new feelings.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Squidward turns into a giant after he is sprayed with plant growth spray; Patrick decides that he wants a nose.

programme.desc: SpongeBob hides from Sandy; SpongeBob and Patrick borrow a balloon from a store and accidentally pop it.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: When SpongeBob gets a pair of long pants, they change his life in unexpected ways; when Larry the Lobster opens a new gym in Bikini Bottom, SpongeBob becomes his best customer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob adopts a stray worm who gives birth to worm babies overnight; Plankton tries to replace Karen with some new computer inventions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Not knowing the contents of Pat's secret box drives SpongeBob crazy; Squidward lies to an old rival about having a band.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: The gang heads to a food convention, but things go awry when they become stranded in the woods; SpongeBob accidentally fibs to his pen pal, but when his friend comes to visit, he must keep the ruse going.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick turn SpongeBob's house into an indoor miniature golf course! When SpongeBob realizes how many memories are attached to all of his possessions, he is reluctant to throw anything way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: While working the graveyard shift, Squidward tells SpongeBob a scary story about the Hash Slinging Slasher; Mr. Krabs is smitten with Ms. Puff.

programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick are cursed when they anger the Flying Dutchman; Squidward and SpongeBob must share a locker.

programme.desc: SpongeBob house-sits for Sandy; SpongeBob and Squidward go to the Kelpy G concert.

programme.desc: Squidward takes a new job as manager of Weenie Hut Jr's; Squidward gets trapped on his way to return a nearly overdue library book.

programme.desc: Plankton masquerades as Gary to steal the Krabby Patty formula; SpongeBob and Patrick play hide and seek.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Once Fred's leg heals up, SpongeBob is determined to keep it out of harm's way; Patrick's lemonade stand is unsuccessful until he gets a secret ingredient from Squidward.

programme.desc: SpongeBob brings home a box of new snail treats for Gary; when Plankton wins a free Krabby Patty, Mr. Krabs tries to keep him from collecting his prize.

programme.desc: Plankton teams up with Man Ray to take over the Krusty Krab and then the world.

programme.desc: SpongeBob gets embarrassed when his grandmother kisses him in public; Squidward leaves Bikini Bottom.

programme.desc: SpongeBob is desperate to meet his newest hero, Kenny the Cat; Mr. Krabs tries to scare Squidward into working harder.

programme.desc: A bicycling accident leaves Squidward coated in mud and leaves; SpongeBob tries to impress Squidward with his new magic kit.
